sentences.arabic: تَشْهَدُ الْأَسْوَاقُ الْعَالَمِيَّةُ حَالَةً مِنَ الِارْتِبَاكِ نَتِيجَةَ الِارْتِفَاعِ الْمُسْتَمِرِّ فِي مُعَدَّلَاتِ التَّضَخُّمِ، مِمَّا دَفَعَ الْبُنُوكَ الْمَرْكَزِيَّةَ إِلَى رَفْعِ أَسْعَارِ الْفَائِدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svjetska tržišta svjedoče stanju konfuzije kao rezultatu kontinuiranog rasta stopa inflacije, što je navelo centralne banke da povećaju kamatne stope.
sentences.translationEn: Global markets are witnessing a state of confusion as a result of the continuous rise in inflation rates, which has prompted central banks to raise interest rates.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ أَدَّى هَذَا الْإِجْرَاءُ إِلَى تَرَاجُعِ الْقُدْرَةِ الشِّرَائِيَّةِ لِلْمُوَاطِنِينَ، خَاصَّةً فِي الدُّوَلِ ذَاتِ الدَّخْلِ الْمُنْخَفِضِ.
sentences.translation: Ova mjera dovela je do pada kupovne moći građana, posebno u zemljama s niskim prihodima.
sentences.translationEn: This measure has led to a decline in the purchasing power of citizens, especially in low-income countries.

sentences.arabic: وَيُحَذِّرُ خُبَرَاءُ الْمَالِ مِنْ أَنَّ الِاسْتِمْرَارَ فِي هَذِهِ السَّيَاسَاتِ النَّقْدِيَّةِ الْمُتَشَدِّدَةِ قَدْ يُدْخِلُ الِاقْتِصَادَ الْعَالَمِيَّ فِي رُكُودٍ طَوِيلِ الْأَمَدِ.
sentences.translation: Finansijski stručnjaci upozoravaju da bi nastavak ovih strožih monetarnih politika mogao gurnuti globalnu ekonomiju u dugotrajnu recesiju.
sentences.translationEn: Financial experts warn that continuing these strict monetary policies could push the global economy into a long-term recession.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّ اضْطِرَابَ سَلَاسِلِ الْإِمْدَادِ قَدْ زَادَ مِنْ تَعْقِيدِ الْمَشْهَدِ، حَيْثُ نَقَصَتِ الْمَوَادُّ الْأَسَاسِيَّةُ فِي الْأَسْوَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Također, poremećaji u lancima snabdijevanja dodatno su zakomplikovali scenu, jer je na tržištima ponestalo osnovnih materijala.
sentences.translationEn: Furthermore, supply chain disruptions have added complexity to the scene, as basic materials have become scarce in the markets.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، تَبْذُلُ بَعْضُ الْحُكُومَاتِ جُهُودًا لِتَقْدِيمِ حُزَمِ دَعْمٍ لِلْفِئَاتِ الْأَكْثَرِ تَضَرُّرًا لِتَخْفِيفِ وَطْأَةِ الْأَزْمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, neke vlade ulažu napore da obezbijede pakete podrške najugroženijim grupama kako bi ublažile teret krize.
sentences.translationEn: Nevertheless, some governments are making efforts to provide support packages for the most affected groups to alleviate the burden of the crisis.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّوَازُنَ بَيْنَ كَبْحِ التَّضَخُّمِ وَتَحْفِيزِ النُّمُوِّ يَبْقَى التَّحَدِّيَ الْأَصْعَبَ لِصُنَّاعِ الْقَرَارِ فِي الْوَقْتِ الرَّاهِنِ.
sentences.translation: Ravnoteža između suzbijanja inflacije i stimulisanja rasta ostaje najteži izazov za donosioce odluka u ovom trenutku.
sentences.translationEn: Balancing the curbing of inflation with the stimulation of growth remains the most difficult challenge for decision-makers at present.
